import polars as pl
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

raw_dir = Path\('data/raw/historic_flood_warnings'\)
ods_files = sorted\(raw_dir.glob\('*.ods'\)\)
for f in ods_files:

    pdf = pd.read_excel\(f, engine='odf'\)

    print\(f'  Columns: {df.columns}'\)
